i_402576: Purrple's optimistic sibling. Good-natured and always wearing a red scarf, it generates stable and gentle electricity. It's a friend to household appliances and a "wireless walking power bank" to boot.

i_402694: A structure that produces Star Dew. Requires a Lumi with the Blessing expertise.
i_402695: The core structure of your Home. Upgrade it to build and upgrade other structures.
i_402696: Legend says the fruits of the Starlit Tree transformed into a home where humans and Lumi live together.
i_402697: A structure that produces Lumi Cards. Requires a Lumi with the Crafting expertise.
i_402698: Essential for catching Lumi, Lumi Cards are the result of Explorers' wisdom. How the energy flowing within works remains a mystery, though it's believed to be connected to the Starlit Tree.
i_402699: A structure that produces Wood. Requires a Lumi with the Logging expertise.
i_402700: Once a logging competition was held here. Mustinja won because it was the only one who brought a knife.
i_402701: A structure that produces Starlit Gems. Requires a Lumi with the Blessing expertise.
i_402702: The Starlit Tree answers the Lumi's prayers by sending down Starlit Gems. These substances, containing the Tree's energy, are the source of Lumi Cards' magical power.
i_402703: A structure that produces basic food ingredients. Requires a Lumi with the Farming expertise.
i_402704: Sunlight, dew, and Lumi's hard work have made this land exceptionally fertile. They say crops grown by Succupurr are particularly plump because they know how to make them "succulent."
i_402705: A structure that produces dishes and foods. Requires a Lumi with the Kindling expertise.
i_402706: Lumi chefs always create the most delicious dishes. To them, cooking is about landing critical hits with their delicious dishes.
i_402707: A structure that produces Stone. Requires a Lumi with the Mining expertise.
i_402708: Lumi mine not just Stone, but gifts from the earth. They dig carefully to preserve the surrounding environment.
i_402709: A structure where Chiccoo lay Eggs.
i_402710: Build Chiccoo a perfect nest, and they'll lay perfect Eggs.
i_402711: A structure that makes Drinks. Requires a Lumi with the Crafting expertise.
i_402712: It's a mixture of morning dew, the fragrance of an orchard, and the Lumi's whimsical imagination. This mysterious liquid delivers delightful surprises with every sip.
i_402713: A structure that provides food for Lumi. Place food in the Restaurant, and Lumi will come to eat.
i_402714: Voted as the most popular place among Lumi every year. Explorers have observed that Lumi always dine in perfect order, as if there's a queue system.
i_402715: Lumi post Orders here. Complete them to earn rewards.
i_402716: Some Explorers once tried to figure out how Lumi post their orders, but all they found were scattered notes nearby.
i_402717: A structure that produces Gravel. Requires a Lumi with the Kindling expertise.
i_402718: Lumi artisans know the importance of timing: Take it out too early, it's just charcoal; take it out too late, it becomes ash. It takes perfect timing to make perfect Gravel, a task that requires extensive experience and intuition.
i_402719: A structure that produces Amethyst Sand. Requires a Lumi with the Mining expertise.
i_402720: Lumi miners have keen intuition and always find the best crystal veins. They say the earth tells them where the best treasures are hidden.
i_402721: A structure that produces Amethyst. Requires a Lumi with the Kindling Pro.
i_402722: Firox loves this job the most. Rather than controlling flames, it seems more fascinated by staring at the shiny finished products. After all, who can resist sparkling treasures?
i_402723: A structure where Moolloon produce Milk.
i_402724: Drinking milk is the secret to staying strong and healthy. Not just Moolloon, but all Lumi believe this.
i_402725: The mysterious Starlit Tree has a special connection with Lumia.
i_402726: Lumi can transform into Starlit Energy here, returning to the planet's life cycle while leaving gifts for Explorers.
i_402727: A structure that produces various components, which can be exchanged for scenery decorations. Requires a Lumi with the Crafting expertise.
i_402728: The pounding sounds are the melodious "symphony" performed by Lumi for their Home. After all, who doesn't want to live in a more beautiful house?
i_402729: A structure that produces candies. Requires a Lumi with the Crafting expertise.
i_402730: Most Lumi are big fans of these sweets. Research shows that candy draws Lumi's attention and makes them easier to catch. Other studies suggest Lumi grow fond of humans who feed them candy.
i_402732: Exploration Level measures your growth in Lumia.
i_402733: As you level up, new systems and rewards will unlock.
i_402734: Consuming Energy is the only way to earn Exploration EXP. Keep exploring.

i_402786: Legend says Lumi lie by the pool, whispering "sweet talk" to it all night long. The morning dew is incredibly sweet because it has heard tons of compliments.

i_402939:
Season Pass

1. Complete Travel Goals to earn Mileage EXP and level up your Pass. Each level unlocks corresponding rewards.

2. The Pass consists of two reward routes:
Glimmer ​Journal: All players can unlock rewards progressively.
Radiant ​Journal: Unlocked on purchase, offering more rewards.

3. Cycle Rewards: After you reach the maximum level, additional EXP converts into Cycle Rewards that can be claimed infinitely.

4. 4. Instant Buy EXP: 15 days after the Pass launches, you can directly buy Mileage EXP to level up your Pass quickly.

i_402993: 1. The Starter Blessing takes effect when you first enter your Home, increasing production speed and structure stock.
i_402994:
2. The Starter Blessing lasts for 7 days. Day 1: Production speed +300%, structure stock +300. Days 2–4: Production speed +200%, structure stock +200. Days 5–7: Production speed +100%, structure stock +100.
After that, the blessing will expire.

i_403018:
1. Each Lucky Carp allows you to play the Lucky Spin once. Lucky Carp can be obtained from the "Luck Out" task under Stellarize - Others.

2. Each spin has a chance to win the grand prize or other prizes. Tap Fistune on the wheel to view grand prize details.

3. If the grand prize is not won after 50 spins, it is guaranteed on the next spin.

4. Rates:
Grand Prize: 2.17%
Coins ×100,000: 34.53%
S1 Rainbow Lumi Egg ×1: 11.51%
Energy ×500:  17.26%
Universal Keepsake ×10: 23.02%

i_403019:

i_700171:
Join the Ladder with your Lumi. 
1. Battle Rules 
The Ladder has three phases with different rules: 
1.1 Beginner Ladder (Bronze, Silver, Gold): Prepare 1 team to fight a battle against the matched opponent. 
1.2 Advanced Ladder (Diamond, Star): Prepare 2 teams and choose 1 to deploy after matching. 
1.3 Supreme Ladder (Master and above): Prepare 3 teams. The battles follow a "ban/pick mode": each player bans 1 team from their opponent, then picks 1 from their own remaining 2 teams. 

2. Promotion Rules 
Each major tier contains 10 minor tiers. Collect 3 stars in each minor tier to advance. 
Winning grants one star, while losing takes away one star. If you achieve a win streak or reached a higher tier last season, you will receive additional stars based on your consecutive wins and tier difference. 
Once reaching a major tier in a season, you will not drop below it. 

3. Ladder Rewards 
Tier Rewards: Immediately available when you first reach a major tier in the current season. Reset at the beginning of each season. 
Weekly Activity Rewards: Earn Ladder Points by participating in Ladder battles and claim rewards upon reaching target points. 
Ranking Rewards: Distributed based on your final tier when the season ends. Players reaching Master or above will receive additional rewards based on ranking.

4. Duo Mode 
Reach the Silver tier for the first time to unlock Duo Mode. You can invite friends to play Duo battles together. 
Duo and Solo Mode tiers are independent. All Ladder rewards will be based on your higher tier or ranking achieved in either mode.
i_700173:
Earn Ladder Points by participating in battles, with bonus points for victories. Rewards reset every Monday. Points earned per battle increase with your Ladder tier:
Bronze: 1 Ladder Point
Silver: 2 Ladder Points
Gold: 3 Ladder Points
Diamond: 4 Ladder Points
Star: 5 Ladder Points
Master or above: 6 Ladder Points
i_700175:
Congratulations! You're about to advance to the more hardcore Advanced or Supreme Ladder. Before that, you need to participate in qualifiers and pass the instructors' tests.
Battle against random instructors and win 2 consecutive matches (for Advanced Ladder) or 3 consecutive matches (for Supreme Ladder) to pass. If you lose any match, you will not be promoted and will lose 1 star.
Prepare your team and take the challenge!

i_700522:
Welcome to the Arena Weekly Tournament.
1. How to Participate
You can enter unlimited times during the tournament week. Each challenge requires one "Weekly Tournament Ticket" (obtained from Ladder matches or purchased in shop).

2. Battle Rules
Set up 3 teams. Matches follow a "Ban/Pick" mode: Each player bans 1 team from their opponent, then picks 1 team from their own remaining 2 teams.

3. Reward Rules
Aim for the highest honor! The challenge round ends after 15 wins or 3 losses. Rewards are distributed based on your total wins.

i_700807:
Welcome to the season event.

1. Season Duration
Each season lasts approximately 9 weeks. When the current season ends, a new season with a different theme will begin, with the following updates:

1.1 Six season maps will be available during the season, with one map unlocking each week. Each map is available for 2 weeks for catching season-exclusive Lumi. Collecting all Lumi in the Season Gallery will grant generous rewards.

1.2 Each season features season-exclusive Stellarization. During the season, you can obtain 1 season-exclusive Lumi and weekly rotating variant Lumi through Stellarization.

1.3 The season Collection Hall features various exclusive cosmetics and full-art Lumi.

1.4 You can purchase season avatar frames and daily resources in the Season Shop or redeem them with in-game Coins.

1.5 The season maps will feature Gyms, which can be challenged for season-exclusive Gym Badges.

2. Reset Rules
When the season ends, the following content and rewards will be reset:

2.1 Tournament Tier: Season rewards based on your Tournament tier will be distributed at the end of the season. Tiers will reset when the new season begins.

2.2 Ladder Tier: Season rewards based on your Ladder tier will be distributed at the end of the season. Tiers will reset when the new season begins.

2.3 Season Orders: Season Orders rewards and tasks will refresh when the new season begins.

2.4 Season Shop: Purchase limits for shop rewards will refresh when the new season begins.

AVG_Text_171: The <color=#FFA500>Restaurant</color>is built. Now hungry Lumi can feast here!
AVG_Text_172:
We've got Berries, but no <color=#FFA500>Stove</color>...
I'll hand out my <color=#FFA500>Roasted Berries</color> for now!
AVG_Text_181: This is a <color=#FFA500>Refined Lumi Card</color>, which is better than a regular one!
AVG_Text_201: Try the <color=#FFA500>Refined Lumi Card</color> you just got. It'll <color=#FFA500>boost your catch rate</color>!
AVG_Text_211: We're now on the Beach Alpha Lumi's turf. Switch to 10x speed and track it down!
AVG_Text_221: Feed Echofrog one <color=#FFA500>Candy</color> to make it easier to catch.
AVG_Text_23011: Yay! We've got all the Lumi on the Beach. Let's head to the <color=#FFA500>Volcano</color>!
AVG_Text_261: Before we knew it, your Lumi are all grown up. Let's evolve them!
AVG_Text_271: If exploration feels too easy, try the <color=#FFA500>Ladder</color> for thrilling battles!
AVG_Text_281: You got a friend request! Now you can share your experiences with other Explorers!
AVG_Text_291: <color=#FFA500>Tap and hold the compass</color> to lock direction and <color=#FFA500>auto-navigate</color>!
AVG_Text_301: The <color=#FFA500>season region</color> is now available! Go catch new Lumi!
AVG_Text_311: You can now join a <color=#FFA500>guild</color>! Explore the continent together with guild members!
AVG_Text_321: So many new faces! Our Home is getting livelier! Let's clear the wild land at the edges to create more space for everyone.
AVG_Text_331: Time to make our Home look prettier! Let's use Planks to craft some <color=#FFA500>decorations</color>.
AVG_Text_341: <color=#FFA500>Return your Lumi to the Starlit Tree</color> and you might be in for a surprise.
AVG_Text_342: Tap to go to the Starlit Tree
AVG_Text_351: Some Lumi have arrived in the <color=#FFA500>Port</color>!
AVG_Text_353: It's <color=#FFA500>Thumpwhale</color>. They're here with orders. Let's show everyone the awesome things we made!
AVG_Text_354: Everything's loaded. Now we just wait for Thumpwhale to bring back <color=#FFA500>rare materials</color>.
AVG_Text_361: We've got more hands on deck. Use the <color=#FFA500>management panel</color> to schedule Home production more easily.
AVG_Text_363: Use the management panel to quickly assign work to Lumi!
AVG_Text_365: If you're unsure how to assign, select from the recommended production modes in the panel.
AVG_Text_371: The Lumi want to get stronger, so I've prepared some <color=#FFA500>training courses</color> for them!
AVG_Text_402: Now the Lumi can learn more skills. Tap to learn skills.
AVG_Text_131: We're now strong enough to take on the <color=#FFA500>Rainforest Gym</color>!
AVG_Text_412: Chin up. The energy's still around! Hexdeer shouldn't have gone far. Let's catch up to it!
AVG_Text_421: We've got the latest Lumi Galleries!
AVG_Text_423: Collect all Lumi in each Gallery for rewards!
AVG_Text_431: A new round of the Explorer Race has kicked off. Check out the rewards!
AVG_Text_441: Huh? There's no one that can work at the <color=#FFA500>Starlit Nursery</color>...
AVG_Text_445: Looking for a Lumi skilled in Blessing? I happen to need to study <color=#FFA500>Lunabelle</color>'s Blessing ability. Take it home with you.
AVG_Text_5002:
Now's the time to catch it.
<color=#FFA500>Tap</color> to use a Lumi Card!
AVG_Text_5071: *blub blub* Let's play in the water!
AVG_Text_20001: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Capy</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nIt has a blank stare and looks down its nose at everyone
AVG_Text_20002: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Purrple</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nWant to pet it? Check if there's static cling first.
AVG_Text_20005: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Succupurr</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt gets chubby in the sun and is extremely huggable
AVG_Text_20006: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Chiccoo</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nYou'll never worry about eggs again with this Lumi
AVG_Text_20007: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Eggsplode</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt lays eggs too, but they'll explode
AVG_Text_20008: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Chickadet</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nIt has the trendiest hair style and mesmerizing dance moves
AVG_Text_20009: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Mushcluck</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nThe mushroom on its head is a mood indicator
AVG_Text_20012: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Flaricat</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nWant to pet it? Test its temper first.
AVG_Text_20013: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Luckicopter</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nMake a wish to it, and it might just come true
AVG_Text_20016: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Charwyn</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nDon't anger it. It spits large fireballs.
AVG_Text_20017: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Charigon</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIts passion can melt any obstacles (literally)
AVG_Text_20018: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Zoricate</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt randomly picks a lucky spectator as the landing cushion
AVG_Text_20019: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Tinkdeer</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt leaves trails of dreamy snowflakes while running
AVG_Text_20020: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Rimedeer</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIts horns are crystal clear ice, but don't try to break them
AVG_Text_20021: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Rainbowdeer</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIts natural fragrance lingers for a long time
AVG_Text_20022: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Nimbuselk</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nThe celestial deer walks above the clouds and brings good fortune
AVG_Text_20023: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Lilirius</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nWalking spring with power to revive all things
AVG_Text_20024: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Merridoo</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt makes healing clip-clop sounds while running
AVG_Text_20025: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Unicorn</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt's drawn to pure souls or people with candy
AVG_Text_20026: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Lycanite</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nWhatever those claws are made of, its scratches hurt
AVG_Text_20027: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Lycanite - Variant</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nThis is what happens when Lycanite forgets sunscreen
AVG_Text_20028: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Motiham</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt's sprinting on the wheel, working hard
AVG_Text_20029: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Muscledog</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA top customer at the gym
AVG_Text_20030: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Cyclodoge</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nThe little cyclone is so fast it makes people dizzy
AVG_Text_20031: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Gooscle</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nMake way for the boss goose
AVG_Text_20033: <size=38><color=#C8712F>TaoTao</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt's collecting Coins for you, just don't ask where from
AVG_Text_20035: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Blundird</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIts reaction time is long enough for another to run around all of Lumia
AVG_Text_20036: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Jellibow</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA pretty princess with a pink ribbon
AVG_Text_20037: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Bowlguin</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nStare at its hairstyle and don't blink
AVG_Text_20038: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Firox</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA living hand warmer in your arms
AVG_Text_20039: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Shlump</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nNot weak at all, just being street smart
AVG_Text_20040: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Moolloon</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\n100% natural and eco-friendly, I swear
AVG_Text_20041: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Screamhog</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nJust like seeing you without any Rainbow Lumi
AVG_Text_20042: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Screamhog - Variant</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIts cry can pierce through the soul
AVG_Text_20043: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Sandlord</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA rat hero who thinks it can command the weather
AVG_Text_20044: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Sandlord - Variant</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nFailing to command the weather, it's determined to try again with a new color
AVG_Text_20047: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Lycub</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIts blue metallic fur is harder than steel plates
AVG_Text_20048: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Mudhorn</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nTough and sturdy, specialized in wall-crashing
AVG_Text_20049: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Inferny</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt leaves burning hoofprints wherever it goes
AVG_Text_20050: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Boxmole</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nAn underground architect pursuing geometric aesthetics
AVG_Text_20051: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Pyrolime</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nWherever it goes becomes a hot zone
AVG_Text_20052: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Aqualime</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIs it pouring? Those are the tears shed when they're spacing out.
AVG_Text_20053: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Cryolime</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt can pretend to be hail and strike from above
AVG_Text_20054: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Graslime</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA sunbathing-loving philosopher whose mind runs entirely on photosynthesis
AVG_Text_20056: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Terralime</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt often pretends to be a stone. Don't trip over it.
AVG_Text_20057: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Noclime</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt likes to blend into shadows, undetectable by passersby
AVG_Text_20058: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Luxlime</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIts body glows like a light bulb, dispelling darkness
AVG_Text_20059: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Royal Slime</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nThe Royal Slime is here. Time for some pranks!
AVG_Text_20060: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Stealbat</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt will steal either your heart or your Coins
AVG_Text_20061: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Zaphound</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nKeep your distance. Beware of electric shock.
AVG_Text_20062: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Chubee</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA worker in the flower fields who believes its hard work will pay off
AVG_Text_20063: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Pan Pan</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt longs to see you return Home
AVG_Text_20064: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Shriegon</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nWearing a coral crown, the ocean ruler makes its entrance
AVG_Text_20067: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Lunabelle</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nHugs the moon and gazes at the sky every night
AVG_Text_20068: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Mustinja</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nAn elite from Wind Valley. It looks grim outside but actually has a sweet tooth
AVG_Text_20069: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Gryling</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIts eggshell is made of a rare gem
AVG_Text_20070: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Gryrion</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nThe future ruler of the sky
AVG_Text_20071: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Gryrion - Variant</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nRejected for its differently colored feathers, yet proud in solitude
AVG_Text_20072: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Glacirin</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nGuardian of the Snow Mountain's divine tree, Abies
AVG_Text_20073: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Uberbeak</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nThrough wind and rain, all for your 5-star review
AVG_Text_20075: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Potatole</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nThe most important thing in the world must be potatoes
AVG_Text_20076: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Rainkat</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA Sharkat most attached to the ocean
AVG_Text_20077: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Psykat</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nReality or dream? That is the question.
AVG_Text_20081: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Glaciotort</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nThe champion of cool, known as the "mobile air conditioner"
AVG_Text_20082: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Pyrotort</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIts temper burns as hot as the flames it wields
AVG_Text_20083: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Aerotort</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nWho says turtles can't fly? Woohoo, up we go!
AVG_Text_20085: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Muscletiger</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nOne punch and you'll be whimpering
AVG_Text_20086: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Charlet</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA fellow who sneezes little flames
AVG_Text_20087: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Qing Long</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nGuardian of the Desert's divine tree, Cactaceae
AVG_Text_20088: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Bai Hu</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nGuardian of the divine tree, Bambusoid
AVG_Text_20089: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Zhu Que</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nGuardian of the divine tree, Firmiana
AVG_Text_20090: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Xuan Wu</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nGuardian of the Ocean's divine tree, Corallia
AVG_Text_20091: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Flameow</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nAlways the prime suspect of arson
AVG_Text_20092: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Zorrat</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA smiling leaf? Don't fall for Its disguise.
AVG_Text_20094: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Glasnake</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nThe bespectacled Head Teacher of the Lumi
AVG_Text_20096: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Pokerfowl</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt grants the ultimate luck to draw a Royal Flush
AVG_Text_20097: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Flamblades</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt mastered dual-wielding and now looks cool while doing it
AVG_Text_20098: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Zoryx</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA mysterious ranger who swoops in for justice
AVG_Text_20099: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Jellistel</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt wishes to share all beauty in the world with you
AVG_Text_20101: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Blazelym</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nThis professional fire starter gives every firefighter a headache
AVG_Text_20102: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Finlym</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt dwells in rapids, seeking strong opponents
AVG_Text_20103: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Crystalym</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nSpiky hailstorm? Guess who did it.
AVG_Text_20104: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Mycelym</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nLost in the forest? It's probably its illusion spores.
AVG_Text_20105: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Buzzlym</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt loves singing loudly during thunderstorms
AVG_Text_20106: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Roclym</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt enjoys quietly sleeping on the ground
AVG_Text_20108: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Lucelym</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA beacon in darkness that helps those lost in the fog
AVG_Text_20109: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Regaffin</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA noble mount that roams both land and sky
AVG_Text_20115: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Sharkitten</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt's known as the "living history of Lumia evolution"
AVG_Text_20116: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Squeekick</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIts enviable bounce is powerful enough to even make itself dizzy
AVG_Text_20123: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Jolkat</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt kept chasing lightning until it became a power generator
AVG_Text_20124: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Aerikat</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt yearns for freedom and enjoys floating freely among clouds
AVG_Text_20125: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Geniphant</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nThe flame in the lamp flickers with wishes
AVG_Text_20127: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Shrielet</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nWhatever you do, don't take off its pacifier, or it'll be your worst nightmare
AVG_Text_20128: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Muskit</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt's small but born with fierce determination in its eyes
AVG_Text_20129: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Mustinjayx</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt mastered the secret art of doubling the might in one punch
AVG_Text_20131: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Volcrab</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA hot-tempered Lumi carrying a volcano
AVG_Text_20133: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Dumbird</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt's so dumb it makes Lumi researchers swear
AVG_Text_20134: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Dumbird - Variant</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nDumbird thinks changing its skin can hide its lack of intelligence
AVG_Text_20136: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Florlet</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA Grass-type dragon living deep in the rainforest
AVG_Text_20137: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Zappup</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt loves everyone but often shocks itself and allies
AVG_Text_20138: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Aubrewrus</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt uses its tusks to balance things perfectly
AVG_Text_20139: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Inferaze</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIts body temperature is fixed at boiling point, giving it a temper like boiling water
AVG_Text_20141: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Tadpuff</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIts main mode of transport is "rolling," and quite fast at it
AVG_Text_20142: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Avochirp</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nDon't doubt it. This bird grew inside an avocado
AVG_Text_20144: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Flufferpillar</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA sleepy bug in the clouds, saving the world in its dreams
AVG_Text_20145: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Fluffocoon</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt peeks from its cloud cradle and sleeps when it gets tired
AVG_Text_20146: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Flufferfly</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nFlies with cloud blankets and sleeps wherever it goes
AVG_Text_20152: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Sundoll</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nThe weather doll that hangs in every home in Lumia
AVG_Text_20153: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Sunymph</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt glows after absorbing sunlight, summoning a patch of clear sky
AVG_Text_20154: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Sunbelle</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nAn unofficial worker of the Lumia Weather Bureau
AVG_Text_20155: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Sentibit</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nDon't pick this pink mushroom! Its battle power is off the charts.
AVG_Text_20156: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Sworbit</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIts drooping ears make its appearance more deceptive
AVG_Text_20157: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Praetobit</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt looks strong, and actually... IS strong
AVG_Text_20159: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Senior Bunja</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nBeing cool is justice! A rebellious trendsetter.
AVG_Text_20160: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Super Bunja</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nCool, stylish, and beautiful, it's loved by all
AVG_Text_20161: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Whiscrow</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nShh, its whistle attracts strange things
AVG_Text_20163: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Otterblade</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nWearing a jester hat to battle is asking for trouble
AVG_Text_20164: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Otterblue</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nThose overly textbook moves are its downfall
AVG_Text_20165: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Otterpink</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nPink fists lead to certain doom
AVG_Text_20166: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Ottersteel</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nToo much armor to finish the fight
AVG_Text_20167: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Ottermet</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIts steel helmet is used as a pot for survival
AVG_Text_20168: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Otterknight</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA true knight who sounds the horn of a counter-attack
AVG_Text_20171: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Ringscale</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\n"Let there be light"... but no one said it couldn't be poisonous
AVG_Text_20173: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Crackle</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nAn egg of an unknown Electric-type Lumi, hatch date unknown
AVG_Text_20174: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Fistune</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIts cat punch always pops out Coins
AVG_Text_20175: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Somina</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nGet some sleep. Have sweet dreams in my embrace.
AVG_Text_20177: <size=38><color=#C8712F>0</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt can sleep while standing, sitting, or even walking
AVG_Text_20178: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Splishlug</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nWherever the waves take it, it goes
AVG_Text_20188: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Twinklix</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nDon't make wishes to it. It's just high voltage.
AVG_Text_20191: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Shriewyn</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA dragon in the ocean, masters of the waves
AVG_Text_20197: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Florwyn</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nAs the embodiment of nature, its dragon breath nurtures plants
AVG_Text_20202: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Garlet</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIts garlic breath can knock out small insects
AVG_Text_20203: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Garwing</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nGarlic power! Get close and get a whiff.
AVG_Text_20205: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Rushalo</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt's incredibly destructive with a strong sense of territory
AVG_Text_20206: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Stickman</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>  New</color></size>\nKeep a one‑stick distance for your safety
AVG_Text_20207: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Sheaker</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>  New</color></size>\nTo catch it, you'll need to take off its shoes first
AVG_Text_20208: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Cactuphant</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>  New</color></size>\nA moving oasis. The desert's new hope.
AVG_Text_20211: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Tirefrog</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>  New</color></size>\nIt can't jump or roll. It just runs on two legs.
AVG_Text_20212: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Bigfoot</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>  New</color></size>\nA tree that loves to run wild and free
AVG_Text_20213: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Bananape</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>  New</color></size>\nHe once wished for an infinite supply of bananas
AVG_Text_20214: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Assaccino</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>  New</color></size>\nEven milk foam can pack a punch
AVG_Text_20238: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Snowbun</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt gradually melts in high temperatures and needs regular snow replenishment
AVG_Text_20239: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Icitle</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt's frozen by its own power and needs a long time to thaw
AVG_Text_20240: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Petrokat</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA Sharkat that enjoys solitude in desolation
AVG_Text_20247: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Trideer</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA rare Lumi dwelling near the divine tree, Lilium
AVG_Text_20248: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Hexdeer</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nWhen six stars align, good fortune prevails
AVG_Text_20258: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Foxannie</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nPlayful and greedy, it counts coins even in its dreams
AVG_Text_20259: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Ticco</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA little bear with a pure and kind heart
AVG_Text_20260: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Squeakie</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nA clever squirrel full of mischievous ideas
AVG_Text_20261: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Buddie</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt's loyal and reliable, and believes in returning favors
AVG_Text_20262: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Mystaro</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747>    New</color></size>\nIt appears aloof but possesses remarkable skills
AVG_Text_20263: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Meeky</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nA hot-blooded young sheep with a fiery spirit
AVG_Text_100101: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Capy</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nOpens its eyes for a glance, but its mouth shows no sign of stopping.
AVG_Text_100501: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Succupurr</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nLies in the grass and exposes its belly without a care in the world.
AVG_Text_100601: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Chiccoo</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nWiggles in its nest to lay a perfect egg.
AVG_Text_100701: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Eggsplode</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nStares at any intruder with unfriendly eyes.
AVG_Text_100801: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Chickadet</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nStruts with the confidence of a seasoned pro.
AVG_Text_101001: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Cabbychick</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPops out of the ground, trying to shake off the mud.
AVG_Text_101201: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Flaricat</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nAlways ready to draw its blade against injustice.
AVG_Text_101301: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Luckicopter</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nThat may not be a four-leaf clover on its head, but it's still lucky.
AVG_Text_101601: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Charwyn</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nFlaps its wings, sending waves of heat washing over you.
AVG_Text_101801: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Zoricate</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nStrikes what it thinks is its coolest pose.
AVG_Text_101901: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Tinkdeer</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nStares at you curiously but doesn't dare approach.
AVG_Text_102001: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Rimedeer</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPaces nonchalantly, leaving a trail of frosted hoofprints.
AVG_Text_102201: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Merridoo</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nSniffs curiously and invites you to play with it.
AVG_Text_102301: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Unicorn</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nLeaves a faint rainbow by its side.
AVG_Text_102401: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Lycanite</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nLooks ready to test its claws on you.
AVG_Text_102501: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Motiham</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nConstantly chants motivational slogans, even while swaying on its feet.
AVG_Text_102701: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Gooscle</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nWarns you with its massive fists.
AVG_Text_102801: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Echofrog</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nMakes strange gurgling sounds from its throat.
AVG_Text_102901: <size=38><color=#C8712F>TaoTao</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nDigs for underground treasures as if no one's around.
AVG_Text_103301: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Bowlguin</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nWaits for you to compliment its hairstyle.
AVG_Text_103401: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Firox</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nShows off its good mood through its flames.
AVG_Text_103601: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Moolloon</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nFloats around completely carefree once unburdened.
AVG_Text_103701: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Screamhog</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nLets out a soul-piercing scream that can be heard from miles away.
AVG_Text_103801: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Sandlord</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPuts on the appearance of a master.
AVG_Text_103901: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Dreamtapir</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nDrifts through dreams with its consciousness.
AVG_Text_104101: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Lycub</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nRegards you as its next target to provoke.
AVG_Text_104201: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Mudhorn</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\Searches for a place to sharpen its horn.
AVG_Text_104301: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Inferny</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nStay any longer, and the land beneath will catch fire.
AVG_Text_104401: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Boxmole</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nEager to pass its bomb to someone else.
AVG_Text_104601: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Aqualime</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPlots to splash you in the face.
AVG_Text_105201: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Luxlime</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nSeemingly innocent without a single scheme.
AVG_Text_105401: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Stealbat</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nWho knows what it might steal?
AVG_Text_105701: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Pan Pan</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nLooks at you with gentle eyes.
AVG_Text_106201: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Mustinja</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nSees you as part of its trial.
AVG_Text_106301: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Gryling</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nWiggles as it tries to take flight.
AVG_Text_106401: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Gryrion</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nHolds its head high, waiting for a friendly gesture.
AVG_Text_106601: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Uberbeak</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nSecretly relieved it wasn't delivering food when it ran into you.
AVG_Text_106901: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Rainkat</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nLooks at you innocently with clear eyes.
AVG_Text_107901: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Charlet</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPlays a game of juggling fireballs in its mouth.
AVG_Text_108601: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Jellibae</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nSplashes around playfully in the water.
AVG_Text_108701: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Glasnake</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nHappily shakes the bells on its tail.
AVG_Text_108801: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Rockilla</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPounds its chest with earth-shaking force.
AVG_Text_108901: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Pokerfowl</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPonders what suit to reveal today.
AVG_Text_109701: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Mycelym</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPlots to get you lost deep in the rainforest.
AVG_Text_109901: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Roclym</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPlots to make you fall into a deep pit.
AVG_Text_110101: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Lucelym</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPlots nothing. All it wants is candies.
AVG_Text_110501: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Sharkat</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nInnocently sneaks a peek at you.
AVG_Text_110801: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Sharkitten</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nGazes at everything around it in wonder.
AVG_Text_111001: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Gambir</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nSeems dissatisfied with its random feather pattern today.
AVG_Text_111501: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Fierikat</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nHasn't considered you a target yet.
AVG_Text_111601: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Jolkat</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nExudes an aura of absolute authority.
AVG_Text_111801: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Geniphant</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nUrgently conjures up a mighty illusion to startle you.
AVG_Text_112001: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Shrielet</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nWaits for you to bow before its majesty.
AVG_Text_112101: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Muskit</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nKeeps reminding itself that it's independent now.
AVG_Text_112301: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Spookling</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPlans to silence you since its scare tactics failed.
AVG_Text_112401: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Volcrab</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nTurns around to see who has the nerve to get in its way.
AVG_Text_112501: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Rocktle</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nTries to intimidate you with its twin horns.
AVG_Text_112801: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Florlet</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nCatches a whiff of a fruity scent on you and feels a bit hungry.
AVG_Text_112901: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Zappup</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nGets so pumped it forgets about its sparking fur.
AVG_Text_113101: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Inferaze</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nRadiates an intimidating heat wave that keeps others away.
AVG_Text_113301: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Tadpuff</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nStares wide-eyed as if searching for something.
AVG_Text_113601: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Flufferpillar</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nCuriously pokes its head out from the clouds.
AVG_Text_113801: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Flufferfly</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nReady to deliver a sweet dream to you.
AVG_Text_114101: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Cryswolf</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nBoasts a cold body but a warm heart.
AVG_Text_114301: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Seabud</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nTimidly searches for a place to hide.
AVG_Text_114501: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Sunymph</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nDances to drive away the rain.
AVG_Text_114701: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Luminey</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nStubbornly wears a giant steel helmet.
AVG_Text_114801: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Shinibun</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nLooks to you for inspiration on new sword techniques.
AVG_Text_115001: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Dimmey</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPresses its ears to the ground, listening for distant sounds.
AVG_Text_115501: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Otterblade</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nNever lets go of its sword, despite its heavy weight.
AVG_Text_115601: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Otterblue</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nInsists on leading from the front.
AVG_Text_115701: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Otterpink</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nSeems more interested in showing off its gem than casting spells.
AVG_Text_115901: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Ottermet</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nQuickly thinks of who to ask for help.
AVG_Text_116601: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Fistune</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPlans to beckon some of your fortune.
AVG_Text_116701: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Somina</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nGet any closer and you'll be yawning.
AVG_Text_116801: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Dreamee</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nSleeps so soundly that nothing can disturb it.
AVG_Text_116901: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Hushhare</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nReady to give you a warm hug.
AVG_Text_117501: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Lazferret</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPretends to be serious, but is already thinking of slacking off.
AVG_Text_118101: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Boxeroo</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nSwings its tail, ready to throw punches.
AVG_Text_118301: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Shriewyn</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nHolds onto its treasure and won't let go.
AVG_Text_118901: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Florwyn</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nLeaves a trail of blooming flowers wherever it goes.
AVG_Text_119201: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Aequor</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nSo nervous it doesn't know what to do.
AVG_Text_119801: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Stickman</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPounds the ground with the stick, making thumping sounds.
AVG_Text_119901: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Sheaker</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nCalculates whether your shoes are worth swapping for its own.
AVG_Text_120001: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Cactuphant</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nSwings its trunk, pretending to be a real elephant.
AVG_Text_120101: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Crocobomber</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nHas its missiles ready to launch.
AVG_Text_120301: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Tirefrog</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nBelieves wheels work better than feet.
AVG_Text_120401: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Bigfoot</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nJust found a new place to take root.
AVG_Text_120501: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Bananape</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nReady to zip up its banana peel.
AVG_Text_120601: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Assaccino</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nCalms its hostility with the aroma of cappuccino.
AVG_Text_120701: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Miss Cappuccino</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPerforms a special dance for you.
AVG_Text_120801: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Bloomveil</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nA bit shy, hesitating to approach.
AVG_Text_120901: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Bloom</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nPierces those who show hostility with its sharp rapier.
AVG_Text_121001: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Battlantis</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nWon't let anyone threaten its colony.
AVG_Text_121101: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Hatchmantis</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nJudges whether you pose a threat.
AVG_Text_121301: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Frutafyre</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nReady to curl up into a ball at any moment.
AVG_Text_122301: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Strutter</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nShakes its bell excitedly, calling you to dash together.
AVG_Text_123101: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Icitle</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nAlready out of breath after just a few steps.
AVG_Text_123201: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Petrokat</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nIt won't easily leave the territory it guards.
AVG_Text_123401: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Ironhorn</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nReady to test how "tough" you are.
AVG_Text_123801: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Clobberprawn</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nStands ready to beat up anyone who intrudes into its territory.
AVG_Text_123901: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Trideer</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nDoesn't quite understand what you mean by good luck.
AVG_Text_124001: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Hexdeer</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nBrings a sense of inner peace to anyone nearby.
AVG_Text_124301: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Inkspire</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nBrimming with curiosity, it wonders what to ask you.
AVG_Text_124401: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Lamphin</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nStares intently at its own lantern.
AVG_Text_125801: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Wizpiggy</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nTests out a new spell it just invented/came up with.
AVG_Text_125901: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Rochelon</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nBlocks the path like a towering mountain.
AVG_Text_126301: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Pincock</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nWaits for you to bow in respect.
AVG_Text_127001: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Gergnaw</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nContentedly wears the outfit it just gnawed out.
AVG_Text_127101: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Loongster</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nVents steam from both of its whiskers.
AVG_Text_127301: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Rhiniron</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nTakes heavy steps that echo with a resounding thud.
AVG_Text_130001: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Stonesloth</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nBelieves it has already greeted you.
AVG_Text_135901: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Berripaca</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nBrought several giant berries to you.
AVG_Text_136101: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Drowcrab</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nTakes a nap right in front of you.
AVG_Text_139801: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Pineowl</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nLooks surprised that someone recognized it among a cluster of pinecones.
AVG_Text_141301: <size=38><color=#C8712F>Travail</color></size><size=22><color=#CD5747> New</color></size>\nAssures you, "No worry! On my way!"
AVG_Text_601001: A <color=#FFA500>shield</color> that uses Flickergy to protect your Lumi from the next skill damage.
AVG_Text_601003: The <color=#FFA500>shield</color> expires when it blocks one <color=#FFA500>skill attack</color> or the protected Lumi <color=#FFA500>leaves the field</color>.
AVG_Text_602001: You have 4 <color=#FFA500>SP</color> now. Use the Lumi's <color=#FFA500>skill</color>!
AVG_Text_12800000: I heard Lumi get a huge power boost every time they ascend!
AVG_Text_128000001: I've gotta keep ascending my Lumi!
AVG_Text_12800001: The Gym Leader gives Evolution Fruits to winning Explorers!
AVG_Text_128000011: I should ask the Gym Leader for more Evolution Fruits...
AVG_Text_12800002: Welcome to the Rainforest Gym. Name's Turnip, the Gym Leader here. It's been forever since a promising Explorer like you came to challenge me. Show me what you've got!
AVG_Text_12800003: Take this badge. You did an awesome job. Can't wait to see you again!
AVG_Text_12800004: Please, not a Grass-type Lumi... not a Grass-type Lumi...
AVG_Text_12800006: Level up! My Lumi's got a bit stronger again! Want to give it a try?
AVG_Text_12800007: Looks like my Lumi need to get stronger.
AVG_Text_12800008: Wow, sweet rookie, you've come a long way! I'm Marina, the Beach Gym Leader. They say you're pretty good. I hope you surprise me.
AVG_Text_12800009: You did great. This Beach Badge is yours.
AVG_Text_12800010: Every Lumi has its own traits. Get to know them well!
AVG_Text_12800011: Did I fail to showcase my Lumi's traits...?
AVG_Text_12800012: Switching Lumi takes time, so your team setup is crucial!
AVG_Text_12800013: The timing for switching is tricky!
AVG_Text_12800014: Yo, are you that new Explorer? I'm Ashen, the Gym Leader here. I've been wanting to battle you. Bring it on!
AVG_Text_12800015: That was one helluva fight! This Volcano Badge is yours now. Keep it up!
AVG_Text_12800016: Rumors say when a skill's type matches the Lumi's, its Power increases!
AVG_Text_12800017: The rumors are true. I'll be more careful when selecting skills next time!
AVG_Text_12800018: Every Lumi's Aptitude is different. You can select more suitable Lumi based on their ratings!
AVG_Text_12800019: Should I pursue Lumi with higher ratings? No, my bond with them is priceless...
AVG_Text_12800020: Desert Gym Leader Zephyr here. I've been expecting you. Get ready to face the erosion of sandstorms. My Lumi and I will give it our all!
AVG_Text_12800021: Admirable performance. Please take this Desert Badge.
AVG_Text_12800022: Battle is unpredictable. I need to think carefully about my Lumi's skill combinations...
AVG_Text_12800023: Next time I'll use a wider variety of skills to handle different situations!
AVG_Text_12800024: Allocate SP wisely across different skills to win!
AVG_Text_12800025: I miscalculated, huh? Next time my calculations will be even more precise!
AVG_Text_12800026: I'm Wyatt, the Canyon Gym Leader. Cowards have no right to challenge me. Show me the wild beast in you!
AVG_Text_12800027: Your wild spirit impressed me! This Canyon Badge is yours.
AVG_Text_12800028: I'll build up SP until I can use my skills in one go to beat you!
AVG_Text_12800029: Oh no, all that SP over the limit went to waste!
AVG_Text_12800030: Which Flicker Skill is the best?
AVG_Text_12800031: I get it now. Each Flicker Skill has its own situation where it shines. I need to choose flexibly!
AVG_Text_12800032: I'm Neve, welcome to Snow Mountain Gym! Even in this frozen land, we must stay energized. Let's warm up and battle!
AVG_Text_12800033: Your bond with your Lumi is strong enough to melt ice and snow. Take this badge and keep moving forward!
AVG_Text_12800034: Let me show you the power of my Lumi's Leech ability!
AVG_Text_12800035: The HP restored still isn't enough...
AVG_Text_12800036: You know, when a Lumi is switched out, all its stat changes disappear!
AVG_Text_12800037: Turns out debuffs on a Lumi don't disappear when it leaves the field...
AVG_Text_12800038: We meet again, Explorer! Your reputation precedes you! Nice work!
AVG_Text_12800039: You've passed my test. Take this advanced Rainforest Badge!
AVG_Text_12800040: If only SP could restore faster...
AVG_Text_12800041: Huh? So different Lumi have different SP restoration rates?
AVG_Text_12800042: Amazing, Wet reduces skill SP cost!
AVG_Text_12800043: Ugh... I was too wrapped up in applying Wet to the Lumi...
AVG_Text_12800044: Hey rookie! You've grown a lot. Guess I'll have to take you seriously now. Get ready. Don't get swallowed by the waves!
AVG_Text_12800045: You're a master surfer. This advanced Beach Badge is yours!
AVG_Text_12800046: I heard training Lumi helps them ascend!
AVG_Text_12800047: Should I take my Lumi for training?
AVG_Text_12800048: Once your Lumi start Burning, they're no match for us!
AVG_Text_12800049: Next time I'll set you on fire faster!
AVG_Text_12800050: It's been a while. That fire in your eyes is hard to forget! I can't wait to battle you!
AVG_Text_12800051: Not bad, I can see how hard you've worked. Take this advanced Volcano Badge!
AVG_Text_12800052: My senior told me every attack has a chance to CRIT, but the probability is low...
AVG_Text_12800054: Stat changes have a huge impact on Lumi.
AVG_Text_12800055: Argh, I didn't make good use of the stat changes...
AVG_Text_12800056: Good to see you again. Looks like the sand hasn't worn out your determination yet. C'mon, show me how much you've grown!
AVG_Text_12800057: You've got my respect. Take this advanced Desert Badge.
AVG_Text_12800058: I can use the Flicker Skill again by consuming 30 SP!
AVG_Text_12800059: Too bad I couldn't build up enough SP...
AVG_Text_12800060: Bzzz! Paralysis will stop your Lumi in their tracks!
AVG_Text_12800062: Hey, Explorer, we meet again. You've still got that wild aura about you. I can't wait to battle!
AVG_Text_12800063: This advanced Canyon Badge is yours. Keep sharpening that wild spirit!
AVG_Text_12800064: I'm looking for Lumi with special colors! Do you have any Lumi like that?
AVG_Text_12800065: I really want a shiny Lumi...
AVG_Text_12800066: So sleepy... I'll just sleep and let the Lumi do their thing...
AVG_Text_12800067: You all did your best. Come back and sleep... *snores*
AVG_Text_12800068: It's been a while, Explorer! I love how you're still full of energy out in the cold. C'mon, let's battle!
AVG_Text_12800069: Take this advanced Snow Mountain Badge and keep that vibrant energy going!
AVG_Text_12800070: I'll show you the might of nature!
AVG_Text_12800071: Ahhh! When did this become your home field?
AVG_Text_12800072: Go, Muscledog! Punch their lights out!
AVG_Text_12800074: Explorer, you've grown by leaps and bounds. Show me how far you've come!
AVG_Text_12800075: I see the vitality of the rainforest in you. Take this Ultimate Badge with pride.
AVG_Text_12800076: Have a cup of cappuccino when you're beat!
AVG_Text_12800077: Sigh, I need another cup of cappuccino...
AVG_Text_12800078: If you lose, you'll have to hand over your shoes to Sheaker!
AVG_Text_12800079: Chin up, Sheaker. The next pair will be even better!
AVG_Text_12800080: Hey, Explorer, we meet again! Kinda miss how adorable you looked when we first met! Hope you won't disappoint me.
AVG_Text_12800081: You've unraveled the secret of the waves. Take this Ultimate Beach Badge and keep moving forward!
AVG_Text_12800082: Isn't my Variant Lycanite cool? It's the king of speed!
AVG_Text_12800083: Guess it's not just about speed after all...
AVG_Text_12800084: With my Battlantis here, you don't stand a chance!
AVG_Text_12800086: I've been waiting for you, Explorer! You’ve really fired me up. C'mon, let's go all out!
AVG_Text_12800087: That was a blast! You've earned this Ultimate Volcano Badge. Now, go conquer the volcano!
AVG_Text_12800088: Stormy weather is where we shine!
AVG_Text_12800089: Turns out you can weather the storm as well!
AVG_Text_12800090: Anyone who hurts Boxeroo will regret it!
AVG_Text_12800092: We meet again, my good friend. What surprises do you have for me this time?
AVG_Text_12800093: You dominated the wind and sand. Take this Ultimate Desert Badge.
AVG_Text_12800094: If you're gonna take me on, be ready to go down together!
AVG_Text_12800095: Even doing my best wasn't good enough...
AVG_Text_12800098: Aha! I knew it was you. Show me how strong you've got!
AVG_Text_12800099: I see the canyon winds have shaped you. This Ultimate Canyon Badge belongs to you.
AVG_Text_12800101: It's okay, Bowlguin. We'll get them next time!
AVG_Text_12800103: My faith in you will never change, Wizpiggy!
AVG_Text_12800104: Been a while, Explorer! Your energy's infectious. Let's see it in our battle!
AVG_Text_12800105: You've unraveled the Snow Mountain's mysteries. Take this Ultimate Snow Mountain Badge!
AVG_Text_12800106: I, Aya, can finally face you on the biggest stage! I don't know if you still remember me, but I've been looking forward to this day for so long!
AVG_Text_12800107: *sobs* Awesome... I knew you are the most amazing Explorer. Soon, all of Lumia will know your name!
AVG_Text_12800108: Surprising, huh? I, the cute charming villain, have infiltrated the Lumia League. It's only a matter of time before I take the championship!
AVG_Text_12800109: Hmph, I just slipped up. The Champion's title will be mine for sure!
AVG_Text_12800110: (Ad Broadcast)! Ahem, okay, done reading. Hey rookie, when are you gonna pay back that Legendary Lumi Card you owe me?
AVG_Text_12800111: The contract said nothing about winning. I let you take that round. Make sure you pay me back!
AVG_Text_12800112: Thanks to your data, I've discovered many interesting combinations. Want to see my findings?
AVG_Text_12800113: You and your Lumi compositions always surprise me. I'll be watching you with great interest.
AVG_Text_12800114: Rookie, you've finally made it to the grand stage. Prove your mettle with a real fight!
AVG_Text_12800115: I was right about you. You've earned the title of Legend. Keep it up and move forward!
AVG_Text_12801002: The whistles are stuck in my head. I can't stop hearing them...
AVG_Text_12801003: I love growing flowers with everyone! You too right, Bloom?
AVG_Text_12801005: We meet again, Explorer! This is where I first met Floragon. Look at it. Beautiful, isn't it?
AVG_Text_12801006: Well, I can't beat you even on a sunny day. Take this Greenwood Badge!
AVG_Text_12801007: Slack off with me and Lazferret. It's good for your body and mind!
AVG_Text_12801008: Alright, we're going to slack off now. See you!
AVG_Text_12801011: Didn't expect to see you here! This is Crysion's home. Careful not to get frostbite from it.
AVG_Text_12801012: You're as full of energy as ever. This Frostridge Badge is yours!
AVG_Text_12801013: Anyone who knows about formations understands how deep this is!
AVG_Text_12801014: I've got a lot to learn from this...
AVG_Text_12801015: We're taking all you've saved up!
AVG_Text_12801017: Hey, Explorer! I could tell from your wild aura that you were here. I was looking for Radibun. Care to see how good it is?
AVG_Text_12801018: You broke through the toughest defense. This Lightguard Badge is yours!
AVG_Text_12801020: Even an elite Explorer like me has to pay for my own cappuccino...
AVG_Text_12801021: No scheme could match absolute power!
AVG_Text_12801023: If it isn't you. Here to conquer the volcano? You'll have to face Charigon first.
AVG_Text_12801024: Hahaha! Take this Ember Badge. I know you've got what it takes to conquer the volcano!
AVG_Text_12801026: Don't get discouraged, Otters. Believe in yourselves!
AVG_Text_12801027: Go, Frutafyre! ...Oh, I mean Fruflare. Wait no, it's Infernadra.
AVG_Text_12801029: We meet again, Explorer. This desert hides Lumia's best ninja arts, but first you'll have to get past Shadowbun.
AVG_Text_12801030: Take this Shadowlurk Badge. Hope you've got something out of this place.
AVG_Text_12801035: Oh, it's you! What a coincidence. If you're exploring here, you might want to learn to get along with Shriegon.
AVG_Text_12801036: Shriegon really likes you. This Dragon Badge is yours!
