N_LQuestText_001:
This is <color=#FFA500>Flameow</color>, a Fire-type Lumi.
The fire on its head is dancing with its thoughts!
N_LQuestText_002:
Wow, this is <color=#FFA500>Zorrat</color>, a Grass-type Lumi.
I heard it particularly enjoys disguising itself as a leaf!
N_LQuestText_003:
The swaying Lumi is <color=#FFA500>Jellibae</color>. It's Water-type.
Look, it's blowing bubbles!
N_NPCText_304: <color=red>{0}</color> is such a special Lumi. May I study it? Please!
N_NPCText_110011: A rookie? Remember my name, Kayo, the first man to complete all Galleries on this continent!
N_NPCText_110012: There's fire in your eyes. Here, I've got a little gift for you.
N_NPCText_110013: No need for formalities! Helping newcomers is what an Explorer should do! Now go! I can't wait to see you become a legend!
N_NPCText_110021: Haha! Seems like you've fallen in love with exploration. Keep up the momentum!
N_NPCText_110022: Here, catch! I picked this for you. It will surely take you even further!
N_NPCText_110031: Not bad, your eyes are sharper now than when we first met. That's how the next legend should look!
N_NPCText_110032: Take this! Consider it a memento of our reunion as two legends!
N_NPCText_110041: That's right! That's the spirit you need. Don't let any obstacles stand in your way!
N_NPCText_110042: Take this and press forward. Show me just how far you can go!
N_NPCText_110051: To complete the Gallery, the most important thing is to never give up. Take these and keep going!
N_NPCText_110052: If you want to thank me, get better than me! I believe in you!
N_NPCText_120011: Your charming and adorable villain—Domino—is here!
N_NPCText_120013: Wow, amazing! Thanks for the gift!
N_NPCText_120014: Wait... Isn't that my secret collection?! Nooo—give it back!
N_NPCText_120021: You again? I'm giving you the honor of running an errand for me. Go take out this trash!
N_NPCText_120022: Wait, these are... uh, coins? Darn, I grabbed the wrong bag again!
N_NPCText_120031: Muhaha! The great villain returns! Look at this bag of shiny coins. Your Lumi are going to turn on you!
N_NPCText_120032: Come with me, all of you! ...Wait, don't run! Hey—give me back my money!
N_NPCText_120041: No Lumi can resist candy. I've come up with the perfect plan. This time I'll take all your Lumi away!
N_NPCText_120051: Hehe, I'll just scatter coins little by little, and your Lumi will surely be blinded by greed!
N_NPCText_120052: That's right, follow me... Wait, stop, don't snatch them!
N_NPCText_120061: All eyes on me! The great villain returns! I'll slow you down with this bag of heavy rocks!
N_NPCText_120062: Wait, that's my coin bag! No wonder the weight was off... Don't go!
N_NPCText_130011: Hi there! I'm Dr. Luna! I need <color=red>{0}</color>'s help with my research! Can I trade you a new Lumi egg for it?
N_NPCText_130021: My research needs <color=red>{0}</color>'s help. Can you bring it to me? Thanks!
N_NPCText_130031: My research is almost complete. Would you find a <color=red>{0}</color> for me?
N_NPCText_130041: <color=red>{0}</color> is such a special Lumi. May I study it? Please!
N_NPCText_130051: Shh... This is our little secret. Take good care of it.
N_NPCText_130052: Take it home, and don't forget to record the data on time!
N_NPCText_130061: It seems to like you a lot. Please take good care of it!
N_NPCText_130062: Don't lose it. It's an important specimen.
N_NPCText_130071: Now, go explore with this new friend of yours!
N_NPCText_130072: Go ahead. I look forward to your data.
N_NPCText_130081: Look, a surprise from the investigation! Let it go on exciting adventures with you.
N_NPCText_130082: Here, take it. This is your destiny.
N_NPCText_130091: I've been expecting you! Here's a special reward for an excellent Explorer!
N_NPCText_130092: Oh, don't be modest. Go on, keep exploring! I'll be waiting for you to bring back more data.
N_NPCText_140011: Are you the Explorer who caught Hexdeer? Amazing!
N_NPCText_140012: Take these Starlit Leaves. I'll always be your fan!
N_NPCText_140021: I-I've collected so many things recently... Hope they can help!
N_NPCText_140022: I hope they'll come in handy!
N_NPCText_140031: I'll be so happy if these can help!
N_NPCText_140032: Take them and keep up the good work!
N_NPCText_140041: I'll work hard to reach your level someday!
N_NPCText_140051: You're the most amazing Explorer in my heart. Please take this!
N_NPCText_140052: I can't wait to hear more stories about your adventures!
N_NPCText_150001: Let me see what good stuff I have today... What? How did I bump into an Explorer!?
N_NPCText_150003: You can't see me... You can't see me...
N_NPCText_150004: Uh... The weather's nice today... See you around!
N_NPCText_160001: Here, child, take this bag of candy. They say Lumi have a sweet tooth and will come with you if you give them candy.
N_NPCText_160002: So be sure to feed them candy!
N_NPCText_160003: If a Lumi doesn't want to come with you, give it candy.
N_NPCText_160004: Candy isn't real food, though. Make sure you feed them something proper too!
N_NPCText_160005: Candy is great, but don't give too much to your Lumi or they'll get cavities.
N_NPCText_160006: Child, your Lumi seem to be starving. Let them try my homemade food.
N_NPCText_160007: Make sure you feed your Lumi.
N_NPCText_160008: Child, have you and your Lumi eaten? Get some fresh fruits and vegetables.
N_NPCText_160009: Make sure you eat your meals on time out there.
N_NPCText_170001: Don't miss out! We're doing a trial event. 100% satisfaction guaranteed!
N_NPCText_170002: If you like it, remember to come back for more!
N_NPCText_170003: So, want to take some home?
N_NPCText_170004: Pretty good stuff, right? How about signing up for a membership?
N_QuestText_7: Come pet me. I'm not hot at all!
N_QuestText_8: Hehe, I'm a little mouse who loves hide and seek.
story_100101: Come rain or shine, they spend half of their time eating and the other half daydreaming.
story_100201: Sparking with electrical purple arcs, this "tsundere" Lumi always has "stay back" written all over its face. Want to pet it? Beware of the static electricity that might turn your hair into an afro.
story_100301: Purrple's optimistic sibling. Good-natured and always wearing a red scarf, it generates stable and gentle electricity. It's a friend to household appliances and a "wireless walking power bank" to boot.
story_100501: Succupurr show affection by rubbing their fluffy bodies against others. They hate feeling wet, and if you force them to take a bath, you might get scratched.
story_100601: Chiccoo are picky about their nests. If the hay doesn't fit their bodies perfectly, they will refuse to lay eggs.
story_100701: Eggsplode have short fuses. They lay real bombs to defy their fate of laying eggs eternally.
story_100801: A chick with a middle-parted hairstyle. Every Chickadet that goes on a journey has practiced jumping for at least two and a half years.
story_100901: Despite its serious face, it's just worried about the "mushroom" falling off its head—that's its new hairstyle!
story_101001: Lacking a sense of security, Cabbychick tend to wrap themselves tightly in their leaf feathers. When startled, they bury themselves in the ground, leaving only a tuft of leaf feathers outside.
story_101101: Cinderbear love good food. They are always researching various cooking techniques, constantly delivering delicious dishes to nearby Lumi.
story_101201: Flaricat are eager to help other young Lumi. Whenever they raise their swords, they forget that they're small themselves.
story_101301: Luckicopter have ordinary three-leaf clovers on their heads. They can't tell if they're truly lucky, but they do notice that on certain days, bugs are especially easy to catch. A legend among Explorers tells that catching a Luckicopter with a four-leaf clover is good luck.
story_101401: A messenger of harvest and an essential Lumi for your Home, able to sense weather changes through the wheat on its head.
story_101601: Charwyn's body temperatures rise continuously as they grow. They often linger around volcanoes, spewing flames wildly to ease their "growing pains." As their pupils turn red, they become increasingly irritable.
story_101701: Charigon contain scorching, explosive energy within their bodies. Every breath they take awakens the sleeping ley lines. It's not that they dwell in volcanoes—rather, volcanoes exist because of Charigon.
story_101801: Zoricate love to spread their wide leaf capes and glide freely between the treetops, scattering the tiny seeds clinging to them far and wide.
story_101901: Tinkdeer's name derives from the subtle sound their antlers make when crystallizing in winter. With each passing winter, their antlers grow an additional branch.
story_102001: The thick fur around their chest has completely turned into ice crystals, a unique symbol of nobility for Rimedeer. They leave behind a thin layer of frost wherever they go.
story_102101: Rainbowdeer's fur changes into nine colors under different light, complementing the rainbow ribbons wrapped around their bodies. Wherever the ribbons go, all malice is dispelled.
story_102102: The adult form of Trideer. Its antlers have blossomed from green buds into vibrant flowers, making it one of the rare Lumi with natural fragrance. Where it treads in the forest, its scent remains for days. Many premium perfumes name their base notes after it.
story_102103: Lilirius is the ultimate symbol of deer-type Lumi. Only select Rainbowdeer that resonate with the divine tree, Lilium, can evolve into Lilirius. They are hailed as "Walking Springs of Lumia," breathing life into withered plants wherever they go. The more abundantly the lilies of the valley on their antlers bloom, the more the continent flourishes in spring. With that, however, comes a heavy responsibility: if their antlers are damaged, Lumia will lose its guide to spring and struggle to recover from harsh winters.
story_102201: Merridoo love playing with children. Only the most innocent kids can touch their carefully groomed manes.
story_102301: Unicorn's manes display brilliant colors under sunlight. When they groom themselves, the splashing droplets refract into a rainbow arc, which people follow to track them.
story_102401: Lycanite have a pair of terrifying steel claws, but their weapons aren't limited to claws—those gleaming hairs are hard as steel, sharp enough to pierce armor.
story_102404: The adult form of Lycub. While its height and build remain almost unchanged, its weight nearly doubles, largely due to the high-density steel fur on its back, making it the heaviest among all wolf-type Lumi.
story_102501: Motiham wear a blue victory headband with determined eyes, dedicated to creating their own inspirational stories.
story_102601: Muscledog train nonstop. They take pride in their imposing physiques and casually show off their muscles, but their wagging tails betray their desire for praise.
story_102602: It boasts an overtrained upper body. When excited, it spins at high speed like a top, sweeping everything away. However, due to being top-heavy, it often lands face-first when trying to brake.
story_102701: Gooscle have built a body of solid muscle. Even their wings have transformed into iron fists, warning any troublemakers who don't toe the line.
story_102801: Three inseparable brothers that live by the rule of repeating important things three times. However, as messages get passed along, they often end up as outrageous rumors.
story_102901: Shiny things are TaoTao's favorite. They can sniff out coins and are always sitting on the ground, panning away. If you meet one, don't just stand there—treasure is right beneath its feet!
story_103101: A dimwitted bird true to its name. If you hear an angry cry of "WAH-AH!" followed by a loud thud in the rainforest, chances are it has crashed into a tree again.
story_103201: Even though their words are always muffled by bubbles, Jellibow never give up on communicating!
story_103301: Bowlguin care most about their hairstyle and spend time grooming every day. Their waddling gait is perfect for showing off their flowing locks.
story_103401: The golden flames dancing on their head and tail tip keep Firox's body warm and cozy. Want to know their mood? Just check the size of their flames.
story_103501: Shlump are nothing if not observant. At the first sign of trouble, they take off like a shot.
story_103601: Moolloon's round bodies store milk and give off a sweet, milky scent. After being milked, they float like balloons. Without weights tied to their tails, they would drift away with the wind.
story_103701: Forever covering their chests with hands in terror, they let out soul-piercing screams when attacked.
story_103704: Forever covering its chest with hands in terror, it lets out soul-piercing screams when attacked.
story_103801: Sandlord tend to communicate with others using homemade pointer sticks. They believe this makes them more intimidating.
story_103804: Sandlord tend to communicate with others using homemade pointer sticks. They believe this makes them more intimidating.
story_103901: Dreamtapir always follow drowsiness at night to find dreams. To them, good and bad dreams are just different flavors of meals. When they encounter a dream they particularly like, they quietly save it to savor later.
story_104101: Lycub's fluffy bodies gleam with metallic luster. Their usually soft fur instantly hardens once they enter battle.
story_104201: Mudhorn are convinced that the path forward should be carved by themselves. They constantly sharpen their horns, trying to shatter all obstacles. Their horns become harder with each injury and recovery.
story_104301: Inferny love to run free, but they accidentally set the ground beneath them on fire when they're frolicking around.
story_104401: These square-headed moles tend to appear together. They hide a trap on one of them and pester passing Explorers into playing whack-a-mole.
story_104501: The purest fire element. These lively Lumi enjoy throwing "parties."
story_104601: The purest water element that often wallows in self-pity. Downpours are mostly their "tears" accidentally shed while they're spacing out.
story_104701: The purest ice element. They look like sparkling gems and are huge fans of "freezing tag."
story_104801: The purest grass element. On sunny days, they always go out in groups to sunbathe.
story_104901: The purest electric element. Their gatherings cause crackling sparks everywhere.
story_105001: The purest earth element. These seemingly "nice guys" enjoy disguising themselves as stones to trip passing Explorers.
story_105101: The purest dark element. Mystifying and cunning, they enjoy stealing others' "light."
story_105201: The purest light element. Shy and quiet, they're kind to everyone around them and love illuminating the path for lost travelers.
story_105301: Only the best prankster Slime can become a king. Under its command, Slime from all directions are ready to thoroughly confuse the next Explorer who wanders in.
story_105401: Stealbat have mask-like markings around their eyes. Rumor has it that they can unlock any lock in the world with the tips of their tails.
story_105501: Zaphound pursue ultimate speed. When they sprint at full speed, they streak past like lightning, leaving a trail of scorched paw prints on the ground.
story_105601: A diligent gatherer. Though it's small, never underestimate the stinger on its tail. It hates being called fat—that's just fluffy fur!
story_105701: A well-fed Pan Pan looks like a fluffy ball. Clearly, they find rolling around faster than moving their limbs.
story_105801: Shriegon can detect everything in the water. Even the waves rise and fall with their breathing. They still prefer shiny things, but now they guard not treasure, but the vast deep sea.
story_106101: Lunabelle dislike sunlight and only come out at night to moonbathe. Whether eating or sleeping, they never leave their crescent moons.
story_106201: Mustinja who left their clan at a young age are used to surviving alone. They're agile and skilled in various ninjutsu.
story_106301: Gryling look adorably naive. Without strong wings yet, they can only take off crookedly and don't mind tumbling to the ground when blown by wind.
story_106401: Gryrion have beautiful, resilient feathers and soar effortlessly through the air. They build nests on the highest cliffs and see all the land below as their territory.
story_106404: The juvenile form of Gryling. Those that survive to this phase are one in a hundred. They receive all the tribe's resources and are carefully nurtured as future rulers of the sky.
story_106501: The guardian of the divine tree, Abies, in the snow mountains and a symbol of sacred will. When harsh winter arrives and the divine tree withers, Glacirin returns to its trunk and seals away chaos with absolute ice power, guiding lost souls back under the Starlit Tree.
story_106601: Have a bamboo-copter on their heads and a family meal set in their mouths. Don't ask if they're tired from flying as all they care about is whether the food is still hot—they hate a late delivery.
story_106801: A master of disguise with sprouts on its head. It often burrows and pretends to be cabbage while waiting to steal potatoes from fields.
story_106901: Rainkat are the Sharkat family's most innocent dreamers. They rarely interact with the outside world, always hiding in the water and playing by themselves.
story_107001: Psykat patrol their territory back and forth every day. Always curious, they poke at this, fiddle with that, then contentedly tell themselves they have guarded everyone one day more.
story_107401: A calm commander in the team with unwavering determination. Like the dual-blade master, it suppresses battlefield chaos with absolute rationality, turning ice into sharp twin blades to carve a path through any desperate situation.
story_107501: With a fiery temperament, it values strength and despises empty talk. The flames in its hands are as fiery as that hero who wields a trident. It always leads the charge and tears through enemy defenses.
story_107601: It doesn't believe in brute force, but in technique and strategy. These wings, defying Lumi biology, are precise devices it installed for itself. Above all, it proves that wisdom is the ultimate weapon from its aerial perspective.
story_107701: The team's mood-maker with endless optimism and energy. To it, battle is like a party. It swings its electrified nunchucks while humming off-beat rhythms, making even defeated enemies sway along.
story_107801: Training muscles always gets Muscletiger's blood pumping. Their massive bodies are like furnaces, with even their breaths being scorching hot.
story_107901: Charlet have extremely high body temperatures, and they accidentally spit flames with every sneeze. They're constantly busy trying to inhale the fires they spark.
story_108001: The guardian of the desert's divine tree, Cactaceae. This dragon with blue scales symbolizes vitality and hope, and governs spring thunder and rain. When it raises its head, the Starlit Tree sprouts new buds. It bestows blessings upon Lumia, breathing life into all things.
story_108101: A majestic Bai Hu serving as the western guardian of the Starlit Tree. This unrivaled war god represents the solemnity of fall. It achieved legendary feats in multiple battles defending the divine tree, bringing precious peace to Lumia.
story_108201: An immortal Zhu Que guarding the volcanic region's divine tree, Firmiana. Covered in crimson flames, it represents light and summer. In Lumia's darkest hour, it was reborn from fire, bringing hope and rebirth with its cry that pierced the night sky.
story_108301: A long-lived sagacious Xuan Wu guarding the ocean's divine tree, Corallia. It represents not only winter and the netherworld, but also unbreakable defense and eternity. It protects in silence and knows all secrets of Lumia's past and future.
story_108401: Flameow are full of questions about the world. When they think, the flame on their forehead sways quietly with their thoughts.
story_108501: Zorrat excel at disguising themselves as leaves dancing gracefully in the forest. These nimble Lumi move with elegance.
story_108601: Jellibae are natural bubble machines, releasing countless bubbles with every word—not for show, but for surviving outside water.
story_108701: Glasnake love music. They use the bells on their tails to beat rhythm while their bodies sway to the tune. Of course, a light-hearted rhythm could turn into a sharp warning.
story_108801: Rockilla have muscles as hard as rock all over their bodies. When excited, they pound their chests, producing thunderous roars like war drums.
story_108901: Pokerfowl treasure their tail feathers above all else and cannot tolerate any dirt. They carefully select the pattern for their fan displays every day.
story_109001: Beneath Flamblades' fierce exterior lies a caring heart. They wield their blazing twin blades to serve the justice they believe in.
story_109101: Zoryx are masters of riding the wind, wearing cloaks woven from grass blades. With a flick of the wind, they vanish among the tree shadows. The sharp darts they carry are not only weapons but also seeds. Where they land, clusters of red grass blades will grow next spring.
story_109201: Jellistel have a gentle nature and are curious about things on land. They often wait on the water surface to guide passing Explorers in need.
story_109401: If something in your pot mysteriously burns or you suddenly get an afro, quickly check if a group of Blazelym are playing nearby.
story_109501: Those poor souls who get soaked by the stream have most likely wandered into Finlym's playground.
story_109601: Every Crystalym has its own ice sculpture den—its proudest creation.
story_109701: Those poor souls who mysteriously get lost in the rainforest are most likely having hallucinations caused by Mycelym's spores.
story_109801: Explorers traveling with Buzzlym must stay sharp—charging is all fun and games until overload occurs.
story_109901: When passing through the Canyon, remember to check if there are any Roclym on the cliff tops. The stones they accidentally drop while playing are no joke!
story_110001: Umbralym hiding in the shadows are hard to detect. Watch out or they might steal your shadow!
story_110101: Lucelym always run to Explorers in trouble, offering help while quietly taking candy from their bags.
story_110201: Regaffin are passionate about chasing storms, training their powerful wings against fierce winds. When they fight in the sky, rumbling thunder is their badge of honor.
story_110501: Unaffected by any element, Sharkat make up the majority of their kind.
story_110601: Leafkat are gentle-natured and excel at soothing emotions and providing guidance, acting as big sister figures among Sharkat colonies. Any negative feelings vanish in their presence.
story_110801: Sharkitten are rare with no fixed habitat and can be encountered anywhere. To survive in diverse environments, they possess exceptional adaptability.
story_110901: It's not that it wants to dance all day, but its spring legs get rusty if it stops moving.
story_111001: Gambir like to make decisions based on the suit of its fallen tail feathers. It's even said to choose mates this way. Some Explorers are determined to own a Gambir and hang around casinos on the days it displays its fan.
story_111101: Lumia's most common deer, small with chubby cheeks. Their gentle nature makes them extremely popular as family companion Lumi.
story_111201: Floragon are gentle by nature. As the flowers on their tails bloom, the rainforest they control expands.
story_111501: Fierikat are the Sharkat family's warriors. They are convinced that out in the world, firepower is king.
story_111601: The Sharkat family's leaders, Jolkat are straightforward and never go back on their word.
story_111701: Aerikat always dwell on high cliffs, avoiding crowds and noise. They yearn for the vastness and freedom of the sky, soaring ever higher with each flight.
story_111801: Most people are drawn to the giant elephant sprayed out by Geniphant, completely forgetting that it came from a tiny lamp.
story_111901: The adult form of Fawntler. If they are well-cared for in their youth, plum blossoms will bloom on their antlers in winter, lasting for as long as three months.
story_112001: Shrielet always hold their heads high, trying to look dignified, but their round bodies make their presence adorable instead of imposing. Don't point that out though—it'll upset them!
story_112101: Mustinja leave their pack at a young age to survive alone. Don't be fooled by their cute appearance—they're natural-born fighters.
story_112201: Muskyx are solitary by nature. They need no extra emotions—only battle. To complete their missions, they'll use any means necessary. Unlike their ever-changing ninja techniques, their eyes remain watchful at all times.
story_112301: Spookling enjoy scaring people by jumping out of nowhere. They hate the sun and sleep curled up in shadows during the day.
story_112401: Walking sideways, Volcrab don't know what lies ahead, but that doesn't matter—as long as the lava on their backs is intimidating enough, they don't need to worry about bumping into others.
story_112501: Rocktle don't need to retreat into their shell for protection as they've found something more effective: a pair of hard horns.
story_112601: The juvenile form of Blundird. Though it has grown in size, its brain capacity hasn't quite caught up. Its name derives from the first researcher who studied it: Amazed by its "intelligence," the researcher blurted out, "What a dumb bird!"
story_112604: The juvenile form of Blundird. Though it has grown in size, its brain capacity hasn't quite caught up. Its name derives from the first researcher who studied it: Amazed by its "intelligence," the researcher blurted out, "What a dumb bird!"
story_112701: The adult form of Blundird, a pleasing result of genetic modification that allowed their brains to finally develop proportionally to their bodies. Though their intelligence still ranks low among bird-type Lumi, it's a quantum leap compared to their former selves.
story_112801: Florlet are lively and active, bringing vitality to the rainforest through their playful chasing. Their keen sense of smell allows them to accurately locate fresh wild fruits in the woods.
story_112901: Zappup are always bursting with energy, running around and often knocking themselves out from not being able to stop. Maybe one day a Zappup will crash right into an Explorer's arms!
story_113001: A master of mimicry with unique purple skin, capable of perfectly disguising itself as a giant floating vegetable to deceive predators while resting by the shore.
story_113101: Most of Inferaze's fur has turned into flames. Being wrapped in blazing fire has made them impulsive and irritable.
story_113201: The ultimate form of Inferaze which voluntarily merged with the dark element. Its ordinary flames are replaced by ghastly fire that only burns at night. As daylight fades, they emerge from the shadows, treading on the dark flames.
story_113301: Their chubby bodies prevent Tadpuff from swimming quickly. When startled, they can only bounce away like a ball.
story_113401: No, you're not seeing things—Lumia is such a magical place where an avocado grows a bird.
story_113601: Flufferpillar are always drawn to sweet dreams. They love floating around dreamers to savor their sweet dreams. When discovered, they shrink into their fluffy clouds and pretend to be asleep.
story_113701: Fluffocoon hide in their cloud blankets all day, sleeping soundly and dreaming sweet dreams that never end.
story_113801: Flufferfly love drifting along with fluffy clouds. When night falls, they quietly bring sweet dreams to sleeping creatures.
story_113901: Meteofly's wings are no longer clouds but brilliant meteors streaking across the night sky. If you're lucky enough to stumble into them, make a wish immediately—they can make good wishes come true.
story_114001: Cryspaw have extremely low body temperatures, with tiny frost forming between their fur. Crushed ice is their favorite toy—not only do they cool down, but it also makes satisfying crunching sounds when bitten.
story_114101: Cryswolf are optimists active on the ice plains. They will be sad if you ignore them because of the cold!
story_114201: Wrapped in chilling cold, Skollfang have the wind and snow at their command. But when they're around those they recognize, they gently tuck away their cold and create a haven of warmth with their fluffy tails.
story_114301: Seabud only live in clean, clear waters. They're masters of hide-and-seek in the ocean, always hiding in seaweed or coral reefs.
story_114401: Sundoll like following travelers home. They're the most accurate weather forecasters, but lose their spark once it rains.
story_114501: Sunymph have the magical ability to block rain—even when it's pouring, they can maintain a patch of clear sky above their owner's yard.
story_114601: Sunbelle's dances can sweep away all gloom. When they dance, all clouds retreat and warm sunlight returns to the land.
story_114701: Luminey always stubbornly hop around with their oversized steel helmets, and one misstep can leave them trapped underneath. They see this as their first trial.
story_114801: Every Shinibun hones its own unique techniques, as only the most perfect swordsmanship can be passed down.
story_114901: Though they are small, Radibun's defense is impregnable. Unyielding and armed with blades honed through countless battles, Radibun are one-man armies.
story_115001: With ears close to the ground, Dimmey can hear movements from afar. They deliberately train themselves in stealth techniques to avoid detection by their kind.
story_115101: Nyxbun always emerge from shadows and vanish into darkness, silently completing battle after battle.
story_115201: From darkness they come, to darkness they return. Shadowbun no longer need to hide their footsteps because their targets will be on the business end of their blades before hearing anything.
story_115301: Whiscrow love mimicking the music they hear, and their calls sound like human whistles. If you don't want to hear the same tune all day, make sure to play different things for them.
story_115401: When you see TouTou, keep your coin pouch close! Will it snatch your purse with its lightning-fast hands, or will you outplay it and claim its treasure? In this game, it's all about skill.
story_115501: Otterblade insist on carrying heavy swords. Perhaps one day they too can be righteous knights.
story_115601: Otterblue always charge to the front of the otter team, sword and shield in hand. Even if the sword isn't sharp enough and the shield isn't sturdy enough, they never fear.
story_115701: Otterpink love collecting shiny stones and carefully select their favorite ones to embed at the tip of their staves.
story_115801: Ottersteel are naturally timid and always hide inside their armor. But when in danger, they drag their heavy armor to the front of the team—even while trembling inside.
story_115901: Ottermet can keenly sense incoming danger. Though they aren't specialists in battle, they can always find the right Lumi to call for help first.
story_116001: There are no born knights on this continent, just otters brave enough to take up swords for their friends. In fact, legendary knights born strong left no names behind, while the tales of five little otters have spread far and wide.
story_116301: A rare snake species known as the "angel on earth," constantly emitting waves that purify the surrounding environment. Legend says its star-tipped wand possesses miraculous healing powers, bestowing blessings only upon the pure of heart.
story_116501: Crackle are reluctant to leave their shells. Anyone who makes them shed will get a taste of electricity.
story_116601: Fistune hope to bring wealth to people, so they become obsessed with gaining power, but they don't seem to realize they've taken a different path...
story_116701: Sleeping Somina pull everyone around into their dreams. For Explorers suffering from insomnia, Somina are the best companion.
story_116801: Dreamee are always asleep. They wander around following the rhythm of their dreams, and even when they occasionally wake up to find themselves lost, they don't panic—when in doubt, just sleep it off. Who knows where they'll wake up next time?
story_116901: Hushhare love making friends! They always treat people warmly and give them a big hug no matter what.
story_117501: Lazferret are born with a unique "stress reliever"—stroking the fish on their tails makes them feel relaxed and comfortable, leading them to develop a habit of touching the fish whenever they get the chance.
story_118001: A Light-type Lumi born under the starry polar night of Snowlent Hill. They often appear with shimmering starlight. If you hear adorable whispers nearby, it's them softly telling ancient tales of the stars.
story_118101: The giant boxing glove on Boxeroo's tail is more intimidating than its fists, though they always use too much force and lose balance when throwing full-power punches.
story_118201: Puncheroo are always ready to fight. As long as they can still swing their fists, they never back down. They love challenging the strong but absolutely refuse to attack the weak.
story_118301: Shriewyn love collecting shiny things to decorate their dens, then lazily hide inside to sleep. They don't like sharing, so don't even think about stealing their "treasure"!
story_118901: Florwyn favor the scent of apples and will feast on apple trees before comfortably enjoying the sunlight. For a good harvest, some orchard owners deliberately leave one or two apple trees to await Florwyn's arrival.
story_119201: Aequor prefer clean, clear waters and slowly purify the surrounding water. They're extremely sensitive to changes in water flow and hide as soon as anyone disturbs them.
story_119301: Clionia are the guardians of their waters, which mercilessly drive out any intruders who harm the environment. On quiet nights, Clionia's mysterious songs echo from the ocean depths.
story_119401: Looking like a short garlic with legs, it is often mistakenly pulled up by farmers. When frightened, they emit a strong garlic smell that brings tears to eyes.
story_119501: This part-garlic, part-bird Lumi often pretends to be a large garlic.
story_119601: A naturally water-loving calf. Good-natured and simple, it loves to greet people by blowing water bubbles.
story_119701: Buffalion always loyally stand in front of their companions. Their thick and powerful limbs seem nailed to the ground, and their broad bodies are like towering mountains, capable of resisting any impact.
story_119801: The sticks that Stickman hold are actually part of their bodies. If they accidentally break or are lost, they will grow new ones.
story_119901: Sheaker love to trade the stuff they collect with Explorers for shoes. Don't think you can get the better deal—they're better at math than you.
story_120001: To move around, Cactuphant gave up their massive roots and instead absorb large amounts of water through their "trunks." Their elephant-like heads are actually disguises to intimidate enemies, giving them a chance to escape danger.
story_120101: Crocobomber's favorite game is dropping bombs from high places, then diving down swiftly to glide through the explosive splashes.
story_120201: To catch up with the migrating group, this straggler underwent a hardcore modification. With alloy wings paired with turbo-charged webbed feet, it's now the only jet-powered bird on the southern migration route.
story_120301: Tirefrog don't like walking properly and always tuck their legs into their tire-shaped bodies to roll around, leaving muddy tracks everywhere.
story_120401: Bigfoot prefer warm and humid environments. To avoid harsh sunlight and extreme cold, they migrate between north and south throughout their lifetimes.
story_120501: When in danger, Bananape close all their "banana peels" and pretend to be just harmless bananas.
story_120601: No one can refuse a cup of coffee—that's Assaccino's best disguise.
story_120701: Miss Cappuccino devote themselves entirely to dance. When tired, they simply get another cappuccino.
story_120801: Bloomveil are spring's messengers. They carefully nurture flower buds, collecting dew to nourish them. Once the flowers bloom, they quietly leave to find the next new bud.
story_120901: Bloom are dancers in flower fields, always mindful of their posture. Don't anger them unless you want to taste their sharp blade.
story_121001: Battlantis value martial arts, with their dual scythes always ready for battle. Each Battlantis sees protecting its clan as its duty and would sacrifice itself for the clan.
story_121101: Hatchmantis refuse to be weak and undergo harsh training from a young age.
story_121201: Fruflare always emit an enticing fruity aroma. To protect themselves, they hide inside spiky shells.
story_121301: Despite their large size, Frutafyre are timid. Unlike their hard shell covered in spikes, their white body is very soft. When in danger, Frutafyre curl themselves into a spiky ball and roll to attack enemies.
story_121401: Infernadra have burned away their spike-covered shells, and their red and white scales have become hard and scorching hot. Their timidity has faded with their fruity scent, replaced by courage and eternal flames that burn everything.
story_122301: Strutter excel at running. The bell around their neck jingles loudly as they run, declaring their owner's location. But when these high-profile creatures are in danger, they waste no time in running away.
story_123001: A rabbit disguised as a snowman. Given its round body, no one can tell whether it's snow or a rabbit when it stays still.
story_123101: Due to the thick ice and snow covering their shells, Icitle always believe winter has arrived, and so spend years in a slumber.
story_123201: Petrokat are the Sharkat family's guardians. They rarely communicate with each other and are accustomed to guarding in silence.
story_123401: Ironhorn always charge recklessly, taking advantage of the thick iron plate on their head. They are the epitome of stubbornness—once they've made up their mind, it's final. Watch out, or you'll get sent flying!
story_123801: Clobberprawn are very territorial and always ready to beat up intruders. They punch incredibly fast—enemies are often knocked out before they even realize what hit them.
story_123901: Trideer always stay in the most vibrant places. Legend has it that those who see them will have good fortune.
story_124001: Hexdeer is surrounded by an "auspicious cloud ribbon" around its neck, so many people view it as a symbol of good fortune.
story_124301: Inkspire carry a notebook everywhere, recording new knowledge at all times—though only they can understand their own doodles. Legend says troubled people who get pecked on the head by them will suddenly gain wonderful inspiration.
story_124401: Lamphin are lantern bearers in the deep sea, creating a small patch of warmth in the cold, dark waters. They usually communicate with each other using light, and when shy, they turn off their lights completely and hide in the darkness.
story_124901: A peculiar deer species cherished by botanists. It has a verdant head, with antlers that are somewhere between branches and succulents. The red "flower" adorning its antlers is a succulent plant. Like real plants, it desperately craves sunlight.
story_125001: Foxannie, a clever and cute little fox. It's playful and greedy, always dreaming of counting coins. It named the small island "Animo" for its future dreams of wealth.
story_125101: Ticco, a gentle giant, a pure-hearted and kind bear. Though occasionally moody, it always shares its smile with everyone, healing all with its warmth.
story_125201: Squeakie, a mischievous squirrel full of clever ideas. It's quick in both mind and movement, swift as the wind. The prankster whirlwind leaves trails of screams and laughter wherever it goes.
story_125301: Buddie, a hardworking and simple dog. Loyal and reliable, it believes in returning every kindness, willing to risk everything when needed. In the bustling Lumia, its only ambition is to pursue steady happiness.
story_125401: Mystaro, the cold and rebellious cat master. This survival expert keeps a low profile, seemingly aloof but full of hidden skills. More surprises await your discovery.
story_125501: Meeky, a hot-blooded young sheep who acts with a fiery spirit. She cannot tolerate even the slightest injustice, always the first to stand up for righteousness.
story_125801: Wizpiggy love gathering together to study magic, though most of their spells don't work out as planned—sometimes they just change the color of their clothes, other times a puff of colorful smoke shoots from their wand tip. But that doesn't matter. As long as Wizpiggy continue to believe in magic, they will one day be able to wield it.
story_125901: Rochelon are unwavering guardians. The twin horns on their head are harder than rock and highly intimidating.
story_126301: Pincock always hold their heads high, showing off their beautiful feathers. They even lift their tails while walking to keep them clean. They are proud creatures which deal with courteous Explorers only.
story_126701: Stormhog's bodies are usually light gray, but they curl into black balls when angry or frightened, wrapping themselves in electric sparks for protection. Be careful—they accidentally discharge electricity when they sneeze too.
story_127001: Gergnaw love building underground nests with intricate tunnels that only they can navigate. When emerging above ground, they fashion dead wood into a shell with their incisors and wear it, which gives them a sense of security.
story_127101: Since Loongster are covered in flames, the waters they inhabit are always steaming with heat. Legend says that after shedding their final shells, they can transform into true dragons.
story_127301: Rhiniron are covered entirely in heavy armor, leaving a deep crater with each step. The massive horns on their heads are incredibly hard and can shatter rocks.
story_130001: Stonesloth move so slowly that it often falls asleep before reacting. Most Explorers have given up on direct communication with them.
story_135901: Berripaca try to create more berry-like things to hide themselves, but once grown, they can no longer fit inside their berry bushes.
story_136101: Drowcrab carry their sleeping caps everywhere, ready to retreat inside for a nap anytime. When they open and close their pincers drowsily, people around them start yawning too.
story_136201: Fungoneer believe life is all about jumping, and that once they stop, they'll turn into mushroom houses.
story_139801: Pineowl are masters of disguise. Their wings feature layered patterns and serrated edges, allowing them to glide down silently like a falling pinecone, always startling timid travelers.
story_141301: Travail always crawl sleepily, carrying a large backpack with all necessary equipment. Where is their destination? Even they don't know.
story_141401: Clumberry love hiding in berry bushes to enjoy delicious berries. Because they eat so much, they always give off a berry fragrance.
StyleDesc_3102102: Ride on clouds with fortune in tow.
StyleDesc_3102103: When winter fades, I am spring.
StyleDesc_3102602: The little cyclone is so fast it makes me dizzy.
StyleDesc_3103704: A desperate soul that lets out a deafening roar.
StyleDesc_3103804: Return in armor, commanding wind and rain.
StyleDesc_3105301: Are you well hidden? The Royal Slime's about to "bounce" over!
StyleDesc_3106404: Wings of unique colors. Indomitable spirit.

T_SkillText_1: Applies a shield to your own Lumi on the field, making them immune to the enemy's next skill damage and debuff. Expires upon leaving.
T_SkillText_2: Restores 25% of Max HP to your own Lumi on the field.
T_SkillText_3: Inspires your own Lumi on the field, increasing their next skill damage by 80%. Expires upon leaving.
T_SkillText_4: Removes all debuffs from your own Lumi on the field.
TeamDesText_4: Have <color=#FFA500>Inferaze</color> quickly apply <link=1><color=red>Burn</color></link> to enemies, then switch in <color=#FFA500>Flamblades</color> and use its exclusive skill for buffs.
TeamDesText_5: Command <color=#FFA500>Sunbelle</color> to use <color=#FFA500>Clear Skies</color> at the start for global buffs, then use <color=#FFA500>Zoryx</color> to deal burst damage.
TeamDesText_6: Survive by switching between <color=#FFA500>Rainbowdeer</color> and <color=#FFA500>Jellistel</color>, accumulate SP, then send out <color=#FFA500>Echofrog</color> at the right moment to deal burst damage with consecutive skills.
TeamDesText_13: At the start, command <color=#FFA500>Gambir</color> to use <color=#FFA500>Storm Strike</color>, changing the weather to <link=12><color=red>Storm</color></link>. Build up SP and wait for the right moment to switch in <color=#FFA500>Regaffin</color> for burst damage. For other Lumi, we suggest those strong against <color=#FFA500>Ice</color> or <color=#FFA500>Electric</color> types to prevent being countered.
TeamDesText_14: Command <color=#FFA500>Infernadra</color> to apply a range of debuffs to enemies. Use the infection mechanic of <color=#FFA500>Glasnake</color>'s exclusive skill to afflict all enemies with debuffs, whittling them over time. Finally, command <color=#FFA500>Muskyx</color> to burst and finish them off.
TeamDesText_15: Each Lumi in this lineup excels at solo combat. Rotate based on type counters, and use countering skills to quickly deplete enemies' HP or gain buffs to shift the battle in your favor.
TeamDesText_16: Frequently switching Lumi in and out triggers entry effects while balancing type counters and resistances, but any Lumi being defeated will significantly disrupt the rotation.
TeamDesText_17: Defeat opponents through superior survival and sustain
TeamDesText_18: Applies Leeched to enemies, absorbing their power to greatly enhance <color=#FFA500>Fairy-Type</color> Lumi, making them stronger in battle
